Home / Design & Creative Tools / Penpot

Penpot — open source alternative

Open source Figma alternative for design-dev collaboration.

Strengths

  • Strong Figma-like UX with design tokens.
  • SVG-native — developer-friendly exports.
  • Self-hostable for confidential work.

Weaknesses

  • Plugin ecosystem is newer.
  • Performance on very large files lags Figma.
  • Collaboration UX still maturing.
License: MPL-2.0 Self-host difficulty: 3/5 Hosted cloud option

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

Penpot is used as an alternative to

Figma

Collaborative interface design in the browser.

See all alternatives →

Canva

Drag-and-drop graphic design for everyone.

See all alternatives →

InVision

Design collaboration, prototyping and whiteboards.

See all alternatives →

Sketch

Mac-first interface design tool.
